---
description: "Architecture Decision Record (ADR) capture: detect when an architecture or design decision is made in conversation and propose an entry for the Architecture Decisions Log. USE FOR: design discussions, plan reviews, PR remediation threads, ad-hoc design pivots, 'we'll go with X not Y' moments. Mirrors the lessons.md capture flow, but for decisions rather than corrections."
applyTo: "**"
---

# ADR Capture (analogous to lessons.md)
